decisions.reasoning: Actually, I realized the issue — I was relying on `augmentedNodeMap` for member positions, but those entries might not exist if members aren't workspace items. I've now changed the approach to compute the member positions directly from the collection's position (`nx`, `ny`) using the same layout formula. This is more reliable because it doesn't depend on the member being in `nodeMap`.
